text:
```data-team-dbt/makefile
                                          
#      _____         _____                  
#     /::\  \       /::\  \         ___     
#    /:/\:\  \     /:/\:\  \       /\__\    
#   /:/  \:\__\   /:/ /::\__\     /:/  /    
#  /:/__/ \:|__| /:/_/:/\:|__|   /:/__/     
#  \:\  \ /:/  / \:\/:/ /:/  /  /::\  \     
#   \:\  /:/  /   \::/_/:/  /  /:/\:\  \    
#    \:\/:/  /     \:\/:/  /   \/__\:\  \   
#     \::/  /       \::/  /         \:\__\  
#      \/__/         \/__/           \/__/  
#	 
################################################################################################
### Machine Variables ###
SHELL:=/usr/bin/env bash -O extglob -O globstar -o pipefail ## brew install bash ##
CURRENT_DIR=$(shell pwd)

PROJECT_BUCKET=data-team-prod-dbt

### DBT Image Info ###
DBT_ADAPTER=dbt-redshift
DBT_ADAPTER_RELEASE_VERSION=v1.7.2
IMAGE_URL=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dbt-labs/dbt-core/$(DBT_ADAPTER_RELEASE_VERSION)/docker/Dockerfile

### Variables ###
IMAGE_NAME=dbt-build-image-local
EXPOSURE=looker
FULL_REFRESH=false
FULL_REFRESH_TRUE=true
FULL_REFRESH_FALSE=false
S3_BUCKET=data-team-prod-dbt

### DBT Image Info ###
# CORE #
DBT_CORE_VERSION:=$(shell cat .dbt_core_release_version)

# ADAPTER #
DBT_ADAPTER_VERSION:=$(shell cat .dbt_adapter_release_version)
DBT_ADAPTER:=dbt-redshift
DBT_THIRD_PARTY:=$(DBT_ADAPTER)==$(DBT_ADAPTER_VERSION)

# CORE SOURCE #
IMAGE_URL:=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dbt-labs/dbt-core/$(DBT_CORE_VERSION)/docker/Dockerfile # 1.8.* pull is broken
IMAGE_URL:=$(CURRENT_DIR)/DockerfileDbtCore # local working copy of remote image

### Docker Images ###
RUNNER_IMAGE:=dbt-runner-image
CORE_IMAGE:=dbt-core-image

### ECR Variables ###
ECR_ACCOUNT=794755647810
ECR_REGION=eu-central-1
ECR_IMAGE:=$(RUNNER_IMAGE)
ECR_URL=$(ECR_ACCOUNT).dkr.ecr.$(ECR_REGION).amazonaws.com
ECR_URI=$(ECR_ACCOUNT).dkr.ecr.$(ECR_REGION).amazonaws.com/data-team/prod/$(ECR_IMAGE)

ifeq ($(FULL_REFRESH), $(FULL_REFRESH_TRUE))
REFRESH=--full-refresh
endif
ifeq ($(FULL_REFRESH), $(FULL_REFRESH_FALSE))
REFRESH=
endif

# Local Dev Defaults
CATEGORY:=dev
TRIGGER:=DEV_ON_DEMAND

# Lint Variables
LINT_DIRS:=macros/ models/intermediate/ models/marts models/staging models/utilities seeds/ snapshots/ tests/ analyses/

.PHONY: default help
default help: ## show help message
	@awk 'BEGIN {FS = ":.*##"; printf "\nUsage:\n  make \033[36m\033[0m\n"} /^[$$()% 0-9a-zA-Z_-]+:.*?##/ { printf "  \033[36m%-15s\033[0m %s\n", $$1, $$2 } /^##@/ { printf "\n\033[1m%s\033[0m\n", substr($$0, 5) } ' $(MAKEFILE_LIST)

###### Project Setup ######
.PHONY: init
init: ## install docker image & python requirements
	@echo '..pulling docker image..'
	make build-core
	make build-runner
	make deps
	make install-prettier


.PHONY: build-core
build-core: ## build dbt core image
	docker build --tag $(CORE_IMAGE) --target dbt-third-party --build-arg dbt_third_party=$(DBT_THIRD_PARTY) --build-arg commit_ref=$(DBT_CORE_VERSION) -f $(IMAGE_URL) .

.PHONY: build-runner
build-runner: ## build dbt runner image
	docker build -f $(CURRENT_DIR)/DockerfileDbtRunner --compress --pull=false --tag $(RUNNER_IMAGE) .

.PHONY: deps
deps: ## install dbt dependencies 
	@echo '..cleaning dbt packages..'
	rm -rf dbt/dbt_packages
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run \
		--network=host \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR),target=/usr/app \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
		deps

.PHONY: version
version: ## check dbt core & plugin
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run \
		--network=host \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR),target=/usr/app \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
		--version

###### Scheduled Assistance ######

.PHONY: prod-profile-create
prod-profile-create: # for production - generates profiles.yml script for job run
	python $(CURRENT_DIR)/runtime/src/profiles_generator.py

.PHONY: prod-deps
prod-deps: # for production - dbt deps and output success/error & run time
	rm -rf target/deps_result.txt
	(time ((dbt deps && echo "run_result:Success" > target/deps_result.txt) || echo "run_result:Error" > target/deps_result.txt) 2>&1 > /dev/null) | grep real | awk '{print "runtime:"$$2}' >> target/deps_result.txt

.PHONY: send-slack-alert
send-slack-alert: #
	python $(CURRENT_DIR)/runtime/src/dbt_operations_info.py --trigger=$(TRIGGER) --category=$(CATEGORY)

###### Project Operations ######
.PHONY: list
list: ## dbt ls
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run \
		--network=host \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR),target=/usr/app \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR)/dbt/profiles.yml,target=/root/.dbt/profiles.yml \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
			ls

.PHONY: test
test: ## dbt tests
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run \
		--network=host \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR),target=/usr/app \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR)/dbt/profiles.yml,target=/root/.dbt/profiles.yml \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
			test

.PHONY: test-select
test-select: ## dbt tests
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run \
		--network=host \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR),target=/usr/app \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR)/dbt/profiles.yml,target=/root/.dbt/profiles.yml \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
			test --select=$(SELECT)

.PHONY: build
build: ## dbt build - run w/ tests
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run \
		--network=host \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR),target=/usr/app \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR)/dbt/profiles.yml,target=/root/.dbt/profiles.yml \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
			build $(REFRESH)

.PHONY: build-select
build-select: check-select ## build with specific query EX: make build-select SELECT=MODEL_NAME
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run \
		--network=host \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR),target=/usr/app \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR)/dbt/profiles.yml,target=/root/.dbt/profiles.yml \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
			build $(REFRESH) --select $(SELECT)

.PHONY: show
show: # Useful for getting which values fails a test
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run \
		--network=host \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR),target=/usr/app \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR)/dbt/profiles.yml,target=/root/.dbt/profiles.yml \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
			show $(REFRESH) -s $(TEST_NAME)

.PHONY: run-exposure 
run-exposure: ## dbt run exposure EX: make run-exposure EXPOSURE=EXPSORUE_NAME
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run \
		--network=host \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR),target=/usr/app \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR)/dbt/profiles.yml,target=/root/.dbt/profiles.yml \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
			run -s +exposure:$(EXPOSURE)

.PHONY: run
run: ## dbt run
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run \
		--network=host \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR),target=/usr/app \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR)/dbt/profiles.yml,target=/root/.dbt/profiles.yml \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
			run $(REFRESH)

.PHONY: run-select
run-select: check-select ## run with specific query EX: make run-select SELECT=MODEL_NAME
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run \
		--network=host \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR),target=/usr/app \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR)/dbt/profiles.yml,target=/root/.dbt/profiles.yml \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
			run $(REFRESH) --select=$(SELECT)

.PHONY: retry
retry: ## dbt retry - runs at point of failure
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run \
		--network=host \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR),target=/usr/app \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR)/dbt/profiles.yml,target=/root/.dbt/profiles.yml \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
			retry

###### Project Documentation ######
.PHONY: generate-docs
generate-docs: ## generate documentation
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run \
		--network=host \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR),target=/usr/app \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR)/dbt/profiles.yml,target=/root/.dbt/profiles.yml \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
			--debug docs generate

.PHONY: docs
docs: generate-docs ## view docs on localhost:8080
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run \
		-p=8080:8080 \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR),target=/usr/app \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR)/dbt/profiles.yml,target=/root/.dbt/profiles.yml \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
			docs serve

.PHONY: model-gen
model-gen: ## generate model yaml information EX: make model-gen MODEL=MODEL_NAME
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run \
		-p=8080:8080 \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR),target=/usr/app \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR)/dbt/profiles.yml,target=/root/.dbt/profiles.yml \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
			run-operation generate_model_yaml --args 'model_names: ["$(MODEL)"]'

###### Project Standards ######

.PHONY: format
format: ## format sql & jinja
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run --entrypoint=/bin/bash \
		--volume $(CURRENT_DIR):/usr/app/ \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
		-c ' \
			echo "..check auto format of yaml files has started.." && \
			npx prettier "models/**/*.yml" "macros/**/*.yml" "tests/**/*.yml" "analyses/**/*.yml" "seeds/**/*.yml" "snapshots/**/*.yml" ".github/**/*.yml" ".pre-commit-config.yaml" ".prettierrc.yaml" --write --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern && \
			echo "..check auto format of yaml files has finished.." && \
			echo "..auto lint & fix of sql files has started.." && \
			sqlfluff fix $(LINT_DIRS) --processes 0 && \
			echo "..auto lint & fix of sql files has finished.." && \
			echo "..auto format of sql files has started.." && \
			sqlfmt macros/ models/ seeds/ snapshots/ tests/ analyses/ && \
			echo "..auto format of sql files has finished.." && \
			echo "..auto format of python files has started.." && \
			black runtime/**/*.py && \
			echo "..auto format of python files has finished.." && \
			echo "..check auto format of terraform files has started.." && \
			cd tf && terraform fmt -recursive && \
			echo "..check auto format of terraform files has finished.." \
		'

.PHONY: verify-format
verify-format: ## format sql & jinja
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run --entrypoint=/bin/bash \
		--volume $(CURRENT_DIR):/usr/app \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
		-c ' \
			echo "..check auto format of yaml files has started.." && \
			npx prettier "models/**/*.yml" "macros/**/*.yml" "tests/**/*.yml" "analyses/**/*.yml" "seeds/**/*.yml" "snapshots/**/*.yml" ".github/**/*.yml" ".pre-commit-config.yaml" ".prettierrc.yaml" --check --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern && \
			echo "..check auto format of yaml files has finished.." && \
			echo "..auto format of sql files has started.." && \
			sqlfmt --check macros/ models/ seeds/ snapshots/ tests/ analyses/ && \
			echo "..auto format of sql files has finished.." && \
			echo "..auto lint & fix of sql files has started.." && \
			sqlfluff lint $(LINT_DIRS) --processes 0 && \
			echo "..auto lint & fix of sql files has finished.." && \
			echo "..auto format of python files has started.." && \
			python -m black runtime/**/*.py --check && \
			echo "..auto format of python files has finished.." && \
			echo "..check auto format of terraform files has started.." && \
			cd tf && terraform fmt -recursive -check && \
			echo "..check auto format of terraform files has finished.." \
		'

.PHONY: lint
lint: ## lint
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run --entrypoint=/bin/bash \
		--volume $(CURRENT_DIR):/usr/app \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
		-c ' \
			echo "..auto lint & fix of sql files has started.." && \
			sqlfluff lint $(LINT_DIRS) --processes 0 && \
			echo "..auto lint & fix of sql files has finished.." \
		'

###### Project Standards ######
.PHONY: install-prettier
install-prettier: ## install dbt dependencies
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run --entrypoint=/bin/bash \
		--volume $(CURRENT_DIR):/usr/app/ \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
		-c 'npm install'


###### Validators ######
.PHONY: compile
compile: ## dbt compile - validates code while connecting the warehouse
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run \
		--network=host \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR),target=/usr/app \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR)/dbt/profiles.yml,target=/root/.dbt/profiles.yml \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
			compile --target-path test

.PHONY: parse
parse: ## dbt parse - validates code without connecting to warehouse
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run \
		--network=host \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR),target=/usr/app \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR)/dbt/mock_profiles.yml,target=/root/.dbt/profiles.yml \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
			parse

.PHONY: check-select
check-select: ## ensure SELECT variable is not empty
	@echo '..ensuring SELECT variable has been populated..'
ifndef SELECT
	$(error Please specify SELECT={select} as a command line argument)
endif

.PHONY: source-freshness
source-freshness: ## verify that the source freshness is acceptable
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run \
		--network=host \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR),target=/usr/app \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR)/dbt/profiles.yml,target=/root/.dbt/profiles.yml \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
			source freshness

###### Project Maintenance ######
.PHONY: clean
clean: ## deletes all dbt generated files
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run \
		--network=host \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR),target=/usr/app \
		--mount type=bind,source=$(CURRENT_DIR)/dbt/profiles.yml,target=/root/.dbt/profiles.yml \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) \
			clean

.PHONY: prune
prune: ## remove all containers, images, volumes & networks
	@echo '..cleaning all docker containers, images, volumnes & networks..'
	docker system prune -a

.PHONY: stop-docker-image
stop-docker-image: ## kill active container hosting the docs
	@echo '..stopping docker container..'
	docker stop $(shell docker ps -q --filter ancestor=$(RUNNER_IMAGE))

###### Terraform ######
.PHONY: tf
tf: ## initialize terraform project
	cd tf && terraform init

.PHONY: plane
plan: ## terraform plan
	cd tf && terraform plan -var-file variables.tfvars

.PHONY: apply
apply: ## terraform auto apply
	cd tf && terraform apply -var-file variables.tfvars -auto-approve

.PHONY: ecr-login
ecr-login:
	aws ecr get-login-password --region $(ECR_REGION) | docker login -u AWS --password-stdin $(ECR_URL)

.PHONY: ecr-deploy
ecr-deploy: ecr-login
	docker tag $(RUNNER_IMAGE) $(ECR_URI)
	docker push $(ECR_URI)

.PHONY: runner-pull-dbt-build-image
runner-pull-dbt-build-image: ecr-login
	docker pull $(ECR_URI):latest
	docker tag $(ECR_URI):latest $(IMAGE_NAME)

# docker run --entrypoint /bin/bash -it dbt-runner 

.PHONY: sync-operation-logs
sync-operation-logs:
	aws s3 sync target/ $(S3_BUCKET)/runs/$(OPERATION_TYPE)/$(VERSION)/target/
	aws s3 sync logs/ $(S3_BUCKET)/runs/$(OPERATION_TYPE)/$(VERSION)/logs/

.PHONY: sync-operation-test-results
sync-operation-test-results:
	aws s3 sync test/ $(S3_BUCKET)/runs/$(OPERATION_TYPE)/$(VERSION)/test/

.PHONY: dist
dist: ## create dist for rlease
	rm -rf dist && mkdir dist
	cp -r analyses/ dist/analyses/
	cp -r dbt/ dist/dbt/
	cp -r macros/ dist/macros/
	cp -r models/ dist/models/
	cp -r runtime/ dist/runtime/
	cp -r seeds/ dist/seeds/
	cp -r snapshots/ dist/snapshots/
	cp -r tests/ dist/tests/
	cp package-lock.yml dist/
	cp packages.yml dist/
	cp dbt_project.yml dist/
	cp makefile dist/
	cp .dbt_adapter_release_version dist/
	cp .dbt_core_release_version dist/
	cp -r .git dist/

.PHONY: release
release: dist ## create zip from dist & upload to s3
	rm -rf dist.zip
	zip -r dist.zip dist/
	aws s3 cp dist.zip s3://$(PROJECT_BUCKET)/release/$(BRANCH)/$(VERSION)/

.PHONY: ecr-pull
ecr-pull: ecr-login
	docker pull $(ECR_URI):latest
	docker tag $(ECR_URI):latest $(RUNNER_IMAGE)

.PHONY: bash
bash: ## enter docker image
	@echo '..starting docker container..'
	docker run --interactive --tty --entrypoint=/bin/bash \
		--volume $(CURRENT_DIR):/usr/app \
		$(RUNNER_IMAGE) || true
```

```sql data-team-dbt/models/staging/redshift/cloud/stg_reconcilliation_project.sql
-- with
    source as (select * from {{ source("cloud", "reconcilliation_project") }}),

    renamed as (
        select
            id,
            battery_discounted_leasing_months as battery_discounted_leasing_months,
            battery_income_from_customer as battery_income_from_customer_loc,
            battery_income_from_edea as battery_income_from_edea_loc,
            battery_transfer_pricing_discount as battery_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            currency,
            ev_charger_income_from_customer as ev_charger_income_from_customer_loc,
            ev_charger_income_from_edea as ev_charger_income_from_edea_loc,
            market as country_code,
            other_income_from_customer as other_income_from_customer_loc,
            other_income_from_edea as other_income_from_edea_loc,
            pv_discounted_leasing_months as pv_discounted_leasing_months,
            pv_income_from_customer as pv_income_from_customer_loc,
            pv_income_from_edea as pv_income_from_edea_loc,
            pv_transfer_pricing_discount as pv_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            total_battery_income as total_battery_income_loc,
            total_ev_charger_income as total_ev_charger_income_loc,
            total_income as total_income_loc,
            total_income_from_customer as total_income_from_customer_loc,
            total_income_from_edea as total_income_from_edea_loc,
            total_other_income as total_other_income_loc,
            total_pv_income as total_pv_income_loc,
            city_tax as city_tax_loc,
            hardware_order_sourcing_cost as hardware_order_sourcing_cost_loc,
            project_id,
            report_id,
            project_bookable_at,
            project_invoiced_at,
            created_at,
            updated_at
        from source
    )

select *
from renamed
```


I'm getting the following error in CI:

```
..auto lint & fix of sql files has started..
== [models/staging/redshift/cloud/stg_reconcilliation_project.sql] FAIL
L:   7 | P:  13 | AL09 | Column should not be self-aliased.
                       | [aliasing.self_alias.column]
L:  17 | P:  13 | AL09 | Column should not be self-aliased.
                       | [aliasing.self_alias.column]
All Finished!
make: *** [makefile:289: verify-format] Error 1
```

What's wrong do you think?
The error message indicates that there are columns that are being self-aliased in the SQL query. Self-aliasing means that you are giving a column the same name as it already had, which is unnecessary and goes against the SQL style guide enforced by your linter.

In the query you provided, two columns are reported as being self-aliased:

1. `battery_discounted_leasing_months` (line 7)
2. `currency` (line 17)

These columns have aliases that are the same as their original names, which is causing the `AL09` error. 

You can fix this by removing those aliases:

```sql
-- with
    source as (select * from {{ source("cloud", "reconcilliation_project") }}),

    renamed as (
        select
            id,
            battery_discounted_leasing_months, -- Remove the alias
            battery_income_from_customer as battery_income_from_customer_loc,
            battery_income_from_edea as battery_income_from_edea_loc,
            battery_transfer_pricing_discount as battery_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            currency, -- Remove the alias
            ev_charger_income_from_customer as ev_charger_income_from_customer_loc,
            ev_charger_income_from_edea as ev_charger_income_from_edea_loc,
            market as country_code,
            other_income_from_customer as other_income_from_customer_loc,
            other_income_from_edea as other_income_from_edea_loc,
            pv_discounted_leasing_months as pv_discounted_leasing_months,
            pv_income_from_customer as pv_income_from_customer_loc,
            pv_income_from_edea as pv_income_from_edea_loc,
            pv_transfer_pricing_discount as pv_transfer_pricing_discount_loc,
            total_battery_income as total_battery_income_loc,
            total_ev_charger_income as total_ev_charger_income_loc,
            total_income as total_income_loc,
            total_income_from_customer as total_income_from_customer_loc,
            total_income_from_edea as total_income_from_edea_loc,
            total_other_income as total_other_income_loc,
            total_pv_income as total_pv_income_loc,
            city_tax as city_tax_loc,
            hardware_order_sourcing_cost as hardware_order_sourcing_cost_loc,
            project_id,
            report_id,
            project_bookable_at,
            project_invoiced_at,
            created_at,
            updated_at
        from source
    )

select *
from renamed
```

By removing the unnecessary aliases on `battery_discounted_leasing_months` and `currency`, you will comply with the linting rules and fix the error.

After making these changes, run your linter again to ensure all checks pass. If there are other columns or issues remaining, the linter will provide additional guidance.
summary: Fix SQL self-aliasing to pass linter in CI
